title: tylophora longipedunculata
intro: Tylophora longipedunculata is a species of flowering plant in the Apocynaceae family, commonly known as the Indian ipecac or Tylophora plant. Traditionally, this plant has been used in Ayurvedic medicine for its medicinal properties, including its ability to treat respiratory issues such as asthma and bronchitis. The extracts of Tylophora longipedunculata have been found to possess anti-inflammatory and expectorant properties, which can help alleviate symptoms of respiratory diseases and provide other health benefits. The plant can be prepared in various herbal forms, including teas, capsules, and tinctures, and is often used in combination with other herbs to enhance its medicinal effects.
